subcodes.first_line: O ye believers in the heart and spirit of Abdul Baha! It has been well-nigh three years since this Servant at the Threshold of Baha has been a wanderer over mountain and desert and a traveler upon plain and sea.
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
